title: Bed Bug Treatment in Kew Gardens, Queens | $1,200 – $3,500
metaDescription: Professional bed bug treatment in Kew Gardens, Queens. Trusted local exterminators serving homes and apartments. Same-day service available. Call now for a free quote!
intro: Bed bugs can quickly infest the beautiful pre-war apartments and Tudor-style homes that make Kew Gardens one of Queens' most desirable neighborhoods. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive bed bug treatment services throughout Kew Gardens, from the garden apartments near Maple Grove Cemetery to the co-ops along Lefferts Boulevard. Our proven heat treatment and chemical solutions eliminate bed bug infestations completely, protecting your home and family.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Kew Gardens residents for years with fast, effective bed bug elimination backed by our satisfaction guarantee. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of treating bed bugs in Kew Gardens' diverse housing stock, from classic apartment buildings to single-family homes, and we use EPA-approved methods that are safe for your family and pets.
localContext: Kew Gardens' tree-lined streets and proximity to Forest Park make it a peaceful residential enclave, but its historic apartment buildings and active rental market can create opportunities for bed bug transmission between units. We're familiar with the area's distinctive architecture, including the iconic Kew Gardens Hills apartments and buildings near the bustling Austin Street commercial corridor, and tailor our treatment approach to each property type.

faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Kew Gardens?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Kew Gardens typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your home, the severity of the infestation, and the treatment method used. We offer free inspections and detailed quotes with no hidden fees, and can provide same-day service for urgent situations.

faqs.question: What bed bug treatment methods do you use in Kew Gardens homes?
faqs.answer: We offer both heat treatment and targeted chemical applications for Kew Gardens properties. Heat treatment eliminates all bed bug life stages in one day by raising room temperatures to lethal levels, while our chemical treatments use EPA-approved products that are safe for occupied homes and are ideal for ongoing prevention and maintenance.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in a Kew Gardens apartment?
faqs.answer: Heat treatment typically takes 6-8 hours for a standard Kew Gardens apartment and eliminates bed bugs in a single visit. Chemical treatments require 2-3 visits spaced 2-3 weeks apart to ensure all bed bugs and newly hatched eggs are eliminated. We'll assess your specific situation during our free inspection and recommend the best approach.

faqs.question: Do you service all of Kew Gardens including co-ops and condos?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide bed bug treatment throughout all of Kew Gardens, including co-op buildings, condominiums, rental apartments, and single-family homes. We're experienced working with building management and boards to coordinate treatment and prevent re-infestation from neighboring units when necessary.
